name: Pet Milk Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Cake Crumbs From The Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together into a bowl.
2. Add the margarine and butter, then beat with an electric mixer to make crumbs. Reserve 1/2 cup of the crumbs for the topping.
3. Add the milk, eggs, and vanilla extract to the remaining crumbs and blend well.
4. Make the topping by mixing all ingredients together.
5. Grease a bundt pan well and pour about 1/3 of the topping into the pan, spreading evenly over the bottom.
6. Add 1/3 of the batter and spread evenly over the topping.
7. Add all of the remaining topping (except for 2 Tbsp) to the top of the batter.
8. Top with the remaining batter, spreading evenly.
9. Top with the remaining 2 Tbsp of topping, sprinkling evenly over the top of the cake.
10. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes or until the cake is done. Cool on a wire rack.
